title: Subtract within 1,000 using place value blocks
description: Practice solving subtraction problems using place value blocks. All numbers used are within 1000.
topic_path: Subtract within 1,000 using place value blocks

assessment_items.question_content:
**Subtract.**  
*Hint: Use the place value blocks to help solve.*

$\Large{\purpleD{536} - \maroonD{218} ={}}$ [[☃ numeric-input 1]] 

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a4158a62312d51a8b11087118587fd20bdf3963a)
hints: Let's use the place value blocks on the chart to help us solve.

In order to subtract, we need to take away $\maroonD{218}$ blocks from the $\purpleD{536}$ blocks.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/94c6fd71969d592035de04c24e57911a66dc8f51)

Since there are only $\purpleD6$ ones, we can break apart $1$ ten into $\purpleD{10}$ ones.

Now, we can take away $\maroonD{218}$ blocks.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e68ca6a426f31ac1544e4a7f64d0ed2da163dc85)

There are $\purpleD{318}$ blocks left.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/af3451d12de1161a64a4469b9612d6fefae389a4)
$\Large{\purpleD{536} - \maroonD{218} =\purpleD{318}}$

Now, we can take away $\maroonD{188}$ blocks.
